arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Blackburn Rovers vs. Leeds United
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Blackburn Rovers vs. Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Insider tips Leeds to make remarkable move for Premier League striker recently linked with Man Utd
arts.sum: Leeds United could be set to pull off a sensational swoop for talented Brighton striker Evan Ferguson in January. That’s according to the club’s former goalkeeper Paul Robinson, who believes a move to Elland Road could be hugely beneficial to both player and club. Outstanding Leeds star tipped to “leave the club” in the January […] The post Insider tips Leeds to make remarkable move for Premier League striker recently linked with Man Utd appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: FA Cup third round draw, start time, ball numbers, TV channel with Leeds United in the hat
arts.sum: Daniel Farke's side made it through to the fifth round last term, beating Peterborough United and Plymouth Argyle. Kelly Somers will host the draw, with ex-Manchester United strikers Mark Hughes and Dion Dublin drawing the teams.

arts.ttl: Championship boss rules out January transfer move for 'fantastic' Leeds United player
arts.sum: He has played obviously also for us and for this club a bit more like a winger who comes inside. A number of niggly injuries has also limited Gelhardt's game time this season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United 'divas' comment in clearest clue yet of Brenden Aaronson's selection fate
arts.sum: “He's so crucial for us because we have many players who make things happen, more or less out of winger positions or pocket positions, we have our creativity from the wing and our quality with goals and assists and we need, in the centre of the park, a player who also covers lots of distance. Goals and assists continue to flow from all but one part of Leeds United’s attack, making it hard to ignore Brenden Aaronson as a candidate for the chop.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers reveal Burnley's away ticket allocation for East Lancs derby
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers will host Burnley at the start of January and it's been revealed how many away tickets will be available

arts.ttl: Archie Gray let down after 10-month wait on Patrick Bamford verdict in Leeds United notebook
arts.sum: In the immediate aftermath of the game, Bamford said Archie Gray excitedly told him it would be shortlisted for the FIFA Puskas Award, the prize for the best goal scored in world football between August 2023 and August 2024. 2024 began with Patrick Bamford scoring the best goal of his career as Leeds United defeated Peterborough United in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Leeds United rivalling Red Bull duo for 18-y/o midfielder at UK club
arts.sum: Leeds United rivalling Red Bull Salzburg, RB Leipzig and Celtic for Lennon Miller Leeds United are said to be one of multiple clubs across Europe eyeing a move to sign Motherwell starlet Lennon Miller in 2025.

arts.ttl: Mind games begin as Leeds United can ignore ‘ridiculous’ regime jibe to stay ahead of rivals
arts.sum: The big game in the Championship actually gets under way on Friday night, as two teams famed for their red and white stripes - Sheffield United and Sunderland - go head to head. Frank Lampard will return to an EFL dugout for the first time since 2019 this weekend when he takes charge of his first match as Coventry City head coach on Saturday.

arts.ttl: FIFA Puskas Award: No Bamford is an insult to Leeds man
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford can count himself incredibly unlucky that he has not been nominated for the 2024 Puskas Award for his stunning volley against Peterborough United. On Thursday evening, FIFA opened the voting for this year’s Puskas Award, a celebration of “spectacular” goals scored during the qualifying period.
